# .NET Testing Standards

## Framework
- xUnit for unit tests
- NSubstitute or FakeItEasy for mocking
- FluentAssertions for readable assertions
- Coverlet for coverage (threshold >= 80%)

## Test Structure
- Arrange-Act-Assert pattern
- One test class per production class
- Use `[Theory]` with `[InlineData]` for parameterized tests
- Use `[Fact]` for single-scenario tests

## Naming
- Method names: `MethodName_Scenario_ExpectedBehavior`
- Example: `CreateOrder_WithEmptyCart_ThrowsValidationException`

## Integration Testing
- Use Testcontainers for database tests
- Use WebApplicationFactory for API integration tests
- Never share state between tests

## Coverage Discipline
- Test all happy paths and failure paths
- Validate with Stryker.NET (mutation score >= 80%)
